next_steps: Perform transthoracic echocardiogram to assess cardiac structure and function
Obtain cardiac MRI for tissue characterization and to look for late gadolinium enhancement
Order Coxiella burnetii serology (Phase I and II IgG/IgM) and PCR
Perform 24-hour Holter monitoring to characterize AV block
Evaluate for medication or supplement-induced hepatotoxicity
Consult Cardiology, Infectious Disease, and Rheumatology
